name: Willy Wonka
description: Elderly business founder with substantial pension, estate, and complex beneficiary chains. Critical test: 2021 snapshot (age 73) is PRE-75 — death benefits tax-FREE to nominated beneficiary. 2026 snapshot (age 78) is POST-75 — death benefits taxed as INCOME at recipient's marginal rate. Also tests: post-75 drawdown sequencing, BPR on long-held company (42yr holding in 2026), nomination staleness, discretionary trust 10-year charge.

pensions.note: PRE-75: death benefits on this date = tax-free to nominated beneficiary. Crucial distinction from 2026 snapshot.

cash.note: NS&I Premium Bonds — unlimited FSCS protection

statePension.note: Full basic + new state pension under transitional rules

business_assets.name: The Wonka Company Ltd
business_assets.note: BPR 100% — 37 years held in 2021 (well beyond 2yr threshold). HMRC challenged trading company status in 2019 — resolved. BPR intact.

trusts.name: Wonka Family Trust
trusts.note: 10-year anniversary charge due 2024 (during 2021 snapshot): 6% of value above NRB at anniversary date. Engine must flag upcoming charge.

life.note: No term cover at 73 — not cost-effective. Wealth self-insures.

gifts_and_trusts_history.note: Outside 7-year PET window — no longer in cumulation
CLT into Wonka Family Trust — used 2014 NRB. Running taper now.

engine_notes: PRE-75 SIPP: death benefits tax-free if Wonka dies on this date (before age 75). Engine must detect age < 75.
CGT AEA £12,300 applies — significantly more valuable than 2026 (£3,000).
Pension AA £40k but pensionContributions=0 — no AA issue.
AIM BPR 100% in 2021 — no £1m cap. Wonka Company qualifies.
Discretionary trust 10-yr charge approaching June 2024 — flag in cashflow.
ISA in estate — no IHT shelter despite large balance.

expected_output_envelope.iht_notes: Estate ~£8.5m. NRB £325k + RNRB £175k (residence to descendants). Wonka Company BPR: £2.6m × 100% relief = £2.6m exempt. SIPP OUTSIDE estate in 2021. Net chargeable: ~£5.4m. IHT ~£2.16m. Couple spousal: offset 60% to Mrs Wonka.
expected_output_envelope.coi_notes: Drawdown strategy suboptimal — ISA unused; Bed-and-ISA not maximised. AEA £12,300 vs currently using 0.

nomination.note: Updated after granddaughter turned 18. Engine must check post-75 tax treatment.

pensions.note: POST-75: death benefits taxed as INCOME at recipient's marginal rate. Charlie (24) would pay 20-40% on inherited pension. Engine must flag this vs 2021 pre-75 scenario.

cash.note: Premium Bonds at max £50k; remainder in NS&I savings

business_assets.name: The Wonka Company Ltd
business_assets.bpr_note: BPR 100% on first £2.5m (APR/BPR combined limit from April 2026). 50% above £2.5m. Company value £3.2m: £2.5m × 0% IHT + £0.7m × 20% IHT = £140k IHT on excess.
business_assets.aimBPR_does_not_apply: Company is unquoted — not AIM. Full BPR rules apply.

trusts.name: Wonka Family Trust
trusts.note: 10-year anniversary charge paid June 2024 (£21.3k). Next charge 2034.

engine_notes: POST-75 SIPP: death benefits taxed as income to recipient. Engine must apply post_age_75=true flag.
SIPP enters IHT estate from April 2027 (Finance Act 2026). Engine must calculate deadline days and flag urgency.
BPR combined cap £2.5m from April 2026: first £2.5m of Wonka Company at 100%, excess at 50%.
CGT AEA only £3,000 — significant from 2021 where it was £12,300. More GIA CGT exposure.
ISA still in estate — no relief. APS for Mrs Wonka if she survives.
Discretionary trust 10-year charge managed: £21.3k paid 2024, next 2034.

expected_output_envelope.iht_notes: Estate ~£11m. NRB+RNRB £500k × 2 (couple) = £1m. Wonka Company: £2.5m exempt, £0.7m × 20% = £140k IHT. SIPP: £1.85m NOW in estate from Apr 2027. Net chargeable ~£8.4m. IHT ~£3.36m. Reduced by spousal exemption 60%.
expected_output_envelope.coi_notes: SIPP not structured for post-75 tax efficiency. £140k BPR excess. ISA estate inclusion. Nomination last updated 2024 — current.
